notes: Iter 6: USER THEORY — R1 is alpha factory, everything else is defense. (1) R1 ULTRA-aggressive: TQQQ raw [0.85,1.0], QQQ/XLU capped at 0.15 → ≥74% normalized TQQQ. (2) R1 band TIGHT: dd_t1 [3%,6%] — exit R1 fast on any drawdown. (3) R1 protection EARLIER: threshold [-2,-1] — fires on mild signal weakness. (4) R2/R3 base+protection TQQQ-free; only upside overrides can re-add TQQQ on strong buy signals. R1's narrow exposure window + early protection should cap leverage damage during slow grinds (the iter 5 failure mode).
